body.title: CLOSED: Wire flight-recorder logging into PeChain LLM call sites
body.result: log_llm_io() wired into pe_plan, pe_situate, pe_hypothesize (3 paths), pe_replan; log_state_snapshot('escalation') at _pe_escalate entry; 171 pe_chain tests green
body.description:
After T-pe-chain-igorbase lands PeChain(IgorBase) and T-igorbase-llm-io-log adds the log methods, wire flight-recorder logging into PeChain. These are the gaps that made the 5-week queue-drain bug and pile-on invisible: no record of what the LLM was asked, what it returned, or what was in the basket at escalation time.

Add these calls inside PeChain methods:
- pe_plan: self.log_llm_io('pe_plan', prompt, response, model, elapsed_ms) after tier.2 call
- pe_situate: self.log_llm_io('pe_situate', prompt, response, model, elapsed_ms)
- pe_hypothesize: self.log_llm_io('pe_hypothesize', prompt, response, model, elapsed_ms) — main call AND retry call
- pe_replan: self.log_llm_io('pe_replan', prompt, response, model, elapsed_ms)
- pe_implement: self.log.info('IMPLEMENT file=%s old_len=%d new_len=%d', file, len(old_string), len(new_string)) for each file write
- _pe_escalate: self.log_state_snapshot('escalation', {k: str(v)[:500] for k, v in self.basket.items()})

All via self.log / self.log_llm_io() — no new forensic_logger calls.

Note: also requires T-igorbase-llm-io-log (the log methods). Gate is T-pe-chain-igorbase (last structural dep); verify T-igorbase-llm-io-log is also done before starting.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code (no docstring change needed — logging calls are implementation detail)
**Scope boundary:** Adding log call sites only. No behavior change. Does not touch callers or any other file.
**Test plan:** After a pe_chain sprint completes or escalates, verify ~/.TheIgors/logs/llm_io/YYYYMMDD.log exists and contains JSON lines with step/prompt/response fields. Verify escalation snapshot appears in ~/.TheIgors/logs/snapshots/YYYYMMDD.log on an escalated ticket. Run full test suite — green required.
